name: minimax
description: MiniMax M-series production wiring patterns: OpenAI-compat quirks, prompt caching, Tier F quant agentic stack, model-upgrade detection. Distilled from a 41-iteration M2.7-highspeed campaign, plus a live-probed MiniMax-M3 layer (reasoning_split clean output, native vision, 512K context/output ceilings, capability tripwire).
